policy.role: launch connector source material for DX Automations
policy.dx_product_rule: Build DX-owned Automations UI and Forge metadata around these connector sources; do not copy the n8n app UI.
policy.license_rule: Preserve upstream notices and expose connector source provenance in Forge receipts.
policy.community_node_rule: Prefer direct imports from independent MIT/Apache/BSD/ISC n8n community packages when available; use this local nodes-base copy to cover built-in connector behavior quickly.
